query:
-- Check if the gmail account has a profile
SELECT up.userId, up.territory, up.businessLines, up.digestEnabled
FROM userProfiles up
WHERE up.userId = 18360001;

-- Check if the gmail account has received any digests
SELECT COUNT(*) as digest_count
FROM digestScheduleLog
WHERE userId = 18360001;
